full_text:
A piece of adnexa was finely minced by María in a sterile petri dish. Then, the pieces were dissociated in 20 mL of Dispase + RQ1-RNAse free DNAse diluted in AdDF+++ medium according to the protocol, but for 2 h.

After RBC lysis, the final pellet was resuspended in 5 mL of dissociating medium

Cell count 1):

total: 6.07 E6/mL

live: 1.96 E6/mL

viability: 32.3%

Size: 7.5um

Cell count 2):

total: 6.89 E6/mL

live: 1.64 E6/mL

viability: 23.8%

Size: 6.9 um

Average cell count: 6.48 E6 /mL

Total volume: 5 mL

Final cell count: 32.4 E6 cells

A) AF488-FAP Flow antibody titration:

Reagent | Stock concentration | Working concentration | Ratio
Omentum gel | 17.7 mg/mL | 2.5 mg/mL | 0.141
Aprotinin | 10 mg/mL | 33.3 ug/mL | 0.003
Thrombin | 100U | 0.3 U | 0.003
Fibrinogen | 25 ug/mL | 0.5 ug/mL | 0.02
